---
name: Bug report
about: Report a page that extracts or parses incorrectly
---

## Failing input

Attach or paste the HTML file (or the URL and a snippet) that triggers
the bug.

## Expected output

What should the tokenizer/extractor have produced?

## Actual output

What did it actually produce (including any error/crash/hang)?

## Mojo version

Output of `mojo --version`.
